releases.title: collectZ v3.23.10
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `App.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.9`. The slice clears app-shell import, empty-catch, hook-baseline, and dependency findings without changing routing, auth, workspace scope, feature flags, dashboard tab, or now-playing behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the stale default React import from the app shell.
Kept local logout cleanup explicit when the backend logout request has already expired.

Documented intentional app-shell state synchronization effects for route normalization, backend-owned scope refresh, feature flag loading, retired tab redirects, feature-gated dashboard destinations, manageable workspace switching, and edition-safe dashboard tab selection.
Included support-staff edition state in the safe-tab effect dependencies.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `60` errors / `32` warnings to `52` errors / `30` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.9
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `ArtView.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.8`. The slice clears Art view accessibility and hook-baseline findings without changing Art product behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the stale default React import from the Art view.
Made Art list rows keyboard reachable while preserving row-level open behavior and edit/delete actions.
Replaced the Art editor backdrop click target with a native button control.
Documented intentional Art state synchronization effects for artist lookup, detail loading, editor form resets, event option loading, list loading, and external focus targets.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `70` errors / `33` warnings to `60` errors / `32` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.8
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `ProfileView.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.7`. The slice clears Profile form accessibility findings, documents intentional account/token synchronization effects, and keeps token status rendering pure without changing profile product behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Associated Profile form labels with their controls.
Kept the Profile token-scope group semantic without using a label for a non-control group.
Documented intentional personal access token loading and authenticated-user form synchronization effects.
Removed a stale default React import.
Kept personal access token expiry status based on token-data updates rather than an impure render-time clock call.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `81` errors / `34` warnings to `70` errors / `33` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.7
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `AdminMergeReviewView.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.6`. The slice clears stale hook dependencies and documents intentional debounced API/search synchronization without changing merge-review product behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Stabilized Admin Merge Review context and lane-state capture helpers with React callbacks.
Stabilized Admin Merge Review queue-load helpers so effect dependencies point at the actual API sync functions.
Documented intentional initial-load, seeded-discovery, and debounced-search effects.
Removed a stale default React import.
Updated the focused admin-shell browser regression to enter Merge Review through the visible sidebar control.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `89` errors / `39` warnings to `81` errors / `34` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.6
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `CollectiblesView.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.5`. The slice extracts small Collectibles UI pieces, cleans the touched row/drawer surface, and leaves Collectibles product behavior unchanged.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Extracted Collectible card and list-row UI from `CollectiblesView.jsx`.
Made Collectible list rows keyboard reachable while preserving existing open/edit/delete behavior.
Replaced the Collectible editor backdrop with a native button.
Documented remaining Collectibles API/focus synchronization effects instead of rewriting Collectibles data flow.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `99` errors / `44` warnings to `89` errors / `39` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.5
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work where the current quality report shows clear value: `EventsView.jsx` was the top remaining frontend lint pocket after `3.23.4`. The slice extracts small Event UI pieces, cleans the touched Event row/drawer surface, and leaves Comic-Con Hunt behavior frozen.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Extracted Event card, Event list-row, and schedule notification recipient option UI from `EventsView.jsx`.
Made Event list rows keyboard reachable while preserving the existing open/edit/delete behavior.
Replaced the Event editor backdrop with a native button.
Documented remaining Event API/focus synchronization effects instead of rewriting Event data flow.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `115` errors / `47` warnings to `99` errors / `44` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.4
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work with a focused Library view cleanup. It makes the touched card/list-row and drawer surfaces lint-clean while preserving existing article-based browser contracts and avoiding broad Library view data-flow rewrites.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed stale `LibraryView.jsx` default React import, unused card props, unused catch bindings, and stale lint disables.
Preserved article-based media/list card containers while adding keyboard activation for the list-row surface.
Documented narrow a11y exceptions around stop-propagation wrappers that protect card/row click behavior for nested rating and selection controls.
Replaced collection editor/detail overlay divs with native button backdrops while preserving the media editor overlay's existing non-focusable click-to-close behavior.
Tightened safe memo/effect dependencies and documented remaining external synchronization effects.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `153` errors / `61` warnings to `115` errors / `47` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.3
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails work by cleaning shared app primitives before the next large-view extraction pass. It removes shared accessibility lint failures around overlays, pagination labels, and clickable poster cards, and trims React hook reset-effect noise in shared drawer/media primitives.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Replaced clickable overlay `div` elements in shared drawer and camera primitives with native buttons.
Associated the shared pagination page-size label with its select control.
Made interactive poster cards render with native button semantics when they are clickable or selection-aware.
Derived cover-image preview URLs and drawer overview expanded state without reset effects.
Added a small keyed-draft helper so collectible metadata editors can reset draft state when their owner/trait key changes without synchronous reset effects.
Documented narrow external-system effect exceptions for mobile shell DOM/media-query synchronization and relationship search/reset state.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `170` errors / `65` warnings to `153` errors / `61` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.2
releases.summary: This release continues the maintainability guardrails path by reducing the highest-signal frontend ESLint baseline in a targeted way. It cleans up Sidebar navigation helper components and adds React JSX usage lint support so JSX-only component references are not falsely reported as unused.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Hoisted Sidebar helper components out of render to satisfy React hooks static-component checks.
Made Sidebar backdrop and collapsed-rail interactions satisfy keyboard/pointer accessibility lint expectations.
Removed unused Sidebar destructuring for no-longer-used space props and derived platform-group state.
Added `eslint-plugin-react` with `react/jsx-uses-vars` so JSX component usage is recognized by ESLint.
Reduced the full frontend quality baseline from `200` errors / `356` warnings to `170` errors / `65` warnings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.23.1
releases.summary: This release tunes the maintainability guardrails added in `3.23.0` so they are more useful during everyday work. It adds a changed-file quality command and makes the baseline report show the highest-volume rules and files without turning lint into a blocking gate yet.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added `npm run quality:frontend:changed` for report-first checks against changed, staged, and untracked files.
Enhanced the frontend quality report with top ESLint rule and file summaries.
Tuned frontend ESLint so legacy `no-unused-vars` findings are warnings while React hooks and accessibility rules remain visible.
Updated maintainability guardrails documentation for the changed-file workflow.
